zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Davenport於1302年出生時，她的父親Sir John Davenport22歲，母親Margery Brereton15歲。她於1317年與William Bulkeley在英國英格蘭爾南特維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在英國爾布爾可勒享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Davenport于1302年出生时，她的父亲Sir John Davenport22岁，母亲Margery Brereton15岁。她于1317年与William Bulkeley在英国英格兰爾南特維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在英国爾布爾可勒享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Davenport was born in 1302, her father, Sir John Davenport, was 22 and her mother, Margery Brereton, was 15. She married William Bulkeley in 1317, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1326, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Davenport est née en 1302, son père, Sir John Davenport, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Brereton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Bulkeley en 1317, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1326, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Davenport 1302 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Davenport 22 und ihre Mutter Margery Brereton 15. Sie hat 1317 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William Bulkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Davenport è nata il nel 1302, sua padre, Sir John Davenport, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margery Brereton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Bulkeley nel 1317, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1326, nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Davenportが1302年に生まれた時，父Sir John Davenportは22歳，母Margery Breretonは15歳であった。1317年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチでWilliam Bulkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Davenport(이)가 1302년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Davenport(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Brereton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 William Bulkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Davenport nasceu em 1302, seu pai, Sir John Davenport, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Brereton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bulkeley em 1317, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1326, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Davenport родилась в 1302 г., её отцу по имени Sir John Davenport было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Brereton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bulkeley в 1317 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude Davenport nació en 1302, su papá, Sir John Davenport, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Brereton, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Bulkeley en 1317, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años.
